name: Axonify Frontline Learning API
what_it_does: Axonify frontline employee learning REST API for microlearning, spaced repetition training, compliance certification, and frontline workforce performance in retail, grocery, financial services, and logistics. Enables AI agents to manage daily training question delivery for automated spaced repetition learning workflow, handle compliance knowledge tracking and certification for frontline regulatory training automation, access topic and learning module management for knowledge library automation, retrieve employee knowledge confidence and performance metrics for frontline workforce intelligence, manage location and team hierarchy for multi-unit training management, handle training campaign and topic assignment for targeted learning program automation, access safety training tracking for OSHA and food safety compliance automation, retrieve manager dashboard and team analytics for frontline leader enablement, manage integration with HR scheduling systems for learning-in-flow-of-work automation, and integrate Axonify with HRIS (Kronos, ADP, Dayforce), POS systems, and LMS for frontline learning ecosystem.
use_cases: Delivering microlearning to frontline workers from daily training agents
Tracking compliance knowledge from regulatory agents
Measuring team knowledge gaps from L&D intelligence agents
Managing location training from multi-unit operators
not_for: Long-form e-learning and course completion (use TalentLMS or Absorb)
Knowledge worker deep skill development without frontline focus
best_when: A retailer, grocery chain, financial services branch network, or logistics operator wanting AI agents to automate daily microlearning delivery, compliance knowledge tracking, and frontline workforce training analytics using brain science-based spaced repetition.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE KNOWLEDGE CONFIDENCE VS FORMAL CERTIFICATION: Axonify knowledge confidence scores measure microlearning retention, not formal certification completion; automated compliance reporting using Axonify confidence scores as certification equivalent creates regulatory audit gap for mandated training certifications (food handler, OSHA 10, alcohol service). GDPR EU FRONTLINE EMPLOYEE TRAINING DATA: Automated Axonify processing of EU frontline employee learning data must comply with GDPR employment data provisions; automated retention beyond statutory employment period creates GDPR violation. LANGUAGE ACCESSIBILITY FOR NON-ENGLISH FRONTLINE WORKERS: Automated daily training delivery for multilingual frontline workforces must correctly deliver language-specific content; automated English-only microlearning to non-English-speaking workers creates training ineffectiveness and potential EEOC language discrimination exposure in some contexts. Scheduling system integration for learning timing — automated Axonify training delivery timed to shift start requires HRIS/WFM scheduling API integration; automated delivery without schedule awareness sends training during off-shift hours and reduces completion rates.

auth.notes: Axonify uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Waterloo, Ontario HQ. Founded 2011. Private (Luminate Capital Partners investor). Frontline employee microlearning platform based on spaced repetition and brain science. Customers: Walmart, Lowe's, Foot Locker, Dollar General, TD Bank, ALDO. Grocery, retail, financial services, and logistics focus. 3,500+ locations globally. Competes with Schoox, TalentLMS, and Axonify for frontline learning.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-learner annual subscription with enterprise volume
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription per active learner or per location; custom enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: Waterloo ON. Private, Luminate Capital investors. Founded 2011. Walmart, Lowe's, Foot Locker enterprise customers. Per-learner annual subscription with enterprise volume pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; microlearning delivery and analytics API throttled per scale tier

known_agent_gotchas: KNOWLEDGE CONFIDENCE SCORE ≠ FORMAL CERTIFICATION: Axonify microlearning confidence scores measure knowledge retention probability, not formal training completion; automated compliance reporting using Axonify confidence score as OSHA, food safety, or TABC certification equivalent creates regulatory audit gap; use Axonify for knowledge reinforcement alongside separate formal certification tracking

DAILY MICROLEARNING DELIVERY TIMING AND SHIFT ALIGNMENT: Automated daily training question delivery must be timed to worker shift start or break; automated microlearning push during off-shift hours reduces completion rates and may annoy workers; integrate with HRIS scheduling API (Kronos, ADP) for shift-aware delivery

HIGH-TURNOVER FRONTLINE WORKER HRIS SYNC LATENCY: Retail and grocery industry high turnover creates frequent user creation and deactivation events; automated HRIS-to-Axonify sync latency creates training access delay for new hires and access window for terminated workers; implement near-real-time provisioning for security

Multi-language content delivery for diverse frontline workforce — automated microlearning delivery for multilingual frontline workers must route to correct language version of training content; automated English-only delivery to Spanish/Mandarin/French-dominant workers creates training ineffectiveness and potential discrimination concern

Manager dashboard data freshness for coaching conversations — Axonify manager team analytics reflect learning data as of last sync/calculation cycle; automated manager coaching prompts using real-time-appearing knowledge gap data may be based on data hours old; communicate data freshness to manager in automated coaching workflow

Axonify question bank content governance — automated content creation for Axonify microlearning question bank must implement subject matter expert review before deployment; automated AI-generated questions without review may contain factual errors that create incorrect knowledge reinforcement for frontline compliance topics
agent_readiness.security_notes: Frontline microlearning. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU/CA/AU. Employee training and knowledge data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Frontline microlearning. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. Global. Employee knowledge and training data.
